steps.t: You were cast from the deck of the Night-jewel, and have managed to struggle back to the dock. Captain Noreth has fished you from the water, and wants…
Lothíriel is in the Great Hall of Dol Amroth. Balakhôr the Scourge has boasted of his plan to you, and now that you know his course you should bring w…
The town of Ethring is in the Ringló Vale, on the road to Pelargir. Lothíriel has asked you to travel through the Ringló Vale and Dor-en-Ernil to help…
Tologlor in the town of Ethring has tried to catch your eye. His expression is one of frightened concern.
